titleStmt.title: SII 38.484: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 484. (A.R. No. 484 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, of the Mahāgaṇapati shrine in the Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravarttin Śrī Rājēndrachōḷa (III) Year 3: Mārgaḻi 25.

summary.p: Damaged. Seems to record a gift of land at Veḷḷūr in Miḍaiyaḷa-nāḍu, made by Vāñjiyamuḍaiyān Tēvaṉ Pichchaṉ for the livelihood of a person whose job was to water one hundred and twenty coconut trees planted by him (donor) in the third prākāra of Tiruttuṟai-nāyaṉār temple at Vaṇḍāḻai-Vēḷūrk-kūṟṟam in Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rācentira
coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mārkaḻi mā
tattu Irupattañcāntiyati(r) nātattirarurThere seems to be some overwriting on this line.vāñciyamuṭai
yāṉ tevaṉ piccaṉeṉ rrRead rāĀcentira coḻava
ḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai veḷurkkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyaārāṉa
tiruttuṟaināyaṉār koyilil muṉṟāmpirakārattu nāṉ
vaippitta teṅkaṅkaṉṟu nūṟṟirupatukkum nirvārkku miva
ṉukku jivaṉattukku Innāṭṭu miṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam ve
ḷḷuril Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa Āḻvārkuḷam Eṉṟu per pecappaṭṭa I
ṟaiyili kuḷat tirutti vaṭakkaṭaiya vivarRead uvarnilaṅkuḻi nūṟaiThe letter ‘ṟa’ is engraved in smaller form below the line�mpatum kār
reccilavaṉ kiḻaikkoṭṭakattuk kolkkaṇṭattu Iṟuppu
nilam muṉṟu mā Araikkāṇicciṉṉamum
t teṅkaṅkaṉṟukku nir
m� tiruvuṭain kku tiru nāmattukkāṇi
te te Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 38.484 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
